commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e739e1f5533f84e7b8882c9c32dfbc02f34508a5)
commands.review_summary:
The branch defers the source-checkout Gateway service config warning, suppresses it when an entrypoint-mismatch audit issue is present, conditionally hides the declined-repair force hint, and adds a unit test for the combined source-checkout/audit path.

Reproducibility: yes. Current source plus the paired issue logs give a high-confidence path: a source-checkout gateway entrypoint, an entrypoint-mismatch audit issue, and a declined or noninteractive repair reaches multiple `Gateway service config` note calls.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is needed because the PR is draft, the current-head proof gate is insufficient, and the remaining blocker is a code-path correction plus contributor proof rather than an automation-only repair.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
